info.title: DDBJ Search API
info.description:
RESTful API for searching and retrieving BioProject, BioSample, SRA, and JGA entries from DDBJ.

See [docs/api-spec.md](https://github.com/ddbj/ddbj-search-api/blob/main/docs/api-spec.md) for behaviour-level specifications (status visibility, sameAs resolution, pagination semantics) and [docs/db-portal-api-spec.md](https://github.com/ddbj/ddbj-search-api/blob/main/docs/db-portal-api-spec.md) for the ``/db-portal/*`` endpoints (unified search and query language).

get.description:
Search entries across all database types.

Supports keyword search, organism/date filtering, pagination,
sorting, field selection, and facet aggregation. Use the ``types``
parameter to narrow the search to specific database types.

parameters.name: page

schema.description: Page number (1-based). Combined with perPage, must satisfy page * perPage <= 10000 (deep paging limit; exceeding it returns 400). For deeper paging, use cursor instead.
schema.title: Page

parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Combined with perPage, must satisfy page * perPage <= 10000 (deep paging limit; exceeding it returns 400). For deeper paging, use cursor instead.

parameters.name: perPage

schema.description: Items per page (1-100). Combined with page, must satisfy page * perPage <= 10000.
schema.title: Perpage

parameters.description: Items per page (1-100). Combined with page, must satisfy page * perPage <= 10000.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Cursor token for cursor-based pagination. Opaque HMAC-signed string returned in the previous response's nextCursor. When specified, almost all search/filter parameters and 'page' must use their defaults; exceptions are perPage / dbXrefsLimit / includeDbXrefs which may be combined. PIT lifetime is 5 minutes after first use; expired tokens return 400. Tokens become invalid across server restarts (signing key regenerates).
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Cursor token for cursor-based pagination. Opaque HMAC-signed string returned in the previous response's nextCursor. When specified, almost all search/filter parameters and 'page' must use their defaults; exceptions are perPage / dbXrefsLimit / includeDbXrefs which may be combined. PIT lifetime is 5 minutes after first use; expired tokens return 400. Tokens become invalid across server restarts (signing key regenerates).

parameters.name: keywords

schema.description: Search keywords. Semantics: (1) comma-separated values are combined with keywordOperator (default OR); (2) spaces inside one value mean AND (all tokens must match in a document); (3) wrap in double quotes for phrase match (e.g. '"whole genome"'); (4) tokens containing - / . + : are auto-phrased (e.g. 'HIF-1', 'COVID-19'); (5) when the value is a single token that matches an INSDC accession ID exactly, 'suppressed' entries are included in the search scope.
schema.title: Keywords

parameters.description: Search keywords. Semantics: (1) comma-separated values are combined with keywordOperator (default OR); (2) spaces inside one value mean AND (all tokens must match in a document); (3) wrap in double quotes for phrase match (e.g. '"whole genome"'); (4) tokens containing - / . + : are auto-phrased (e.g. 'HIF-1', 'COVID-19'); (5) when the value is a single token that matches an INSDC accession ID exactly, 'suppressed' entries are included in the search scope.

parameters.name: keywordFields

schema.description: Limit keyword search to specific fields (comma-separated). Allowed: identifier, title, name, description, organism.name.
schema.title: Keywordfields

parameters.description: Limit keyword search to specific fields (comma-separated). Allowed: identifier, title, name, description, organism.name.

parameters.name: keywordOperator

schema.description: Boolean operator for combining comma-separated keywords: AND or OR. Default OR. Tokens inside a single comma-separated value (e.g. 'whole genome') are always AND-combined regardless of this setting; use double quotes for phrase match.

parameters.description: Boolean operator for combining comma-separated keywords: AND or OR. Default OR. Tokens inside a single comma-separated value (e.g. 'whole genome') are always AND-combined regardless of this setting; use double quotes for phrase match.

parameters.name: organism

schema.description: NCBI Taxonomy ID, digits only (e.g. '9606').
schema.title: Organism

parameters.description: NCBI Taxonomy ID, digits only (e.g. '9606').

parameters.name: accessibility

schema.description: Term filter on accessibility (all DB shared). Allowed: public-access, controlled-access. Re-injectable from the accessibility facet bucket value.
schema.title: Accessibility

parameters.description: Term filter on accessibility (all DB shared). Allowed: public-access, controlled-access. Re-injectable from the accessibility facet bucket value.

parameters.name: organization

schema.description: Nested filter on organization.name. Semantics: spaces = AND, commas = OR, double quotes = phrase, tokens with - / . + : auto-phrased. Accepted on cross-type and all type-specific endpoints; types whose schema has no organization nested path yield no hits naturally on Elasticsearch side.
schema.title: Organization

parameters.description: Nested filter on organization.name. Semantics: spaces = AND, commas = OR, double quotes = phrase, tokens with - / . + : auto-phrased. Accepted on cross-type and all type-specific endpoints; types whose schema has no organization nested path yield no hits naturally on Elasticsearch side.

parameters.name: publication

schema.description: Nested filter on publication.title. Semantics: spaces = AND, commas = OR, double quotes = phrase, tokens with - / . + : auto-phrased. Accepted on cross-type and all type-specific endpoints.
schema.title: Publication

parameters.description: Nested filter on publication.title. Semantics: spaces = AND, commas = OR, double quotes = phrase, tokens with - / . + : auto-phrased. Accepted on cross-type and all type-specific endpoints.

parameters.name: grant

schema.description: Nested filter on grant.title. Semantics: spaces = AND, commas = OR, double quotes = phrase, tokens with - / . + : auto-phrased. Accepted on cross-type and all type-specific endpoints.
schema.title: Grant

parameters.description: Nested filter on grant.title. Semantics: spaces = AND, commas = OR, double quotes = phrase, tokens with - / . + : auto-phrased. Accepted on cross-type and all type-specific endpoints.

parameters.name: sort

schema.description: Sort order as '{field}:{direction}'. Fields: datePublished, dateModified. Direction: asc, desc. Default: relevance (search score).

parameters.description: Sort order as '{field}:{direction}'. Fields: datePublished, dateModified. Direction: asc, desc. Default: relevance (search score).

parameters.name: fields

schema.description: Limit response to specific top-level fields (comma-separated). Example: 'identifier,organism,datePublished'.
schema.title: Fields

parameters.description: Limit response to specific top-level fields (comma-separated). Example: 'identifier,organism,datePublished'.

schema.description: Include the 'properties' field in the response.
schema.title: Includeproperties

parameters.description: Include the 'properties' field in the response.

parameters.name: includeFacets

schema.description: Include facet aggregation alongside search results.
schema.title: Includefacets

parameters.description: Include facet aggregation alongside search results.

parameters.name: types

schema.description: Filter by database types (comma-separated). Allowed: any of DbType.
schema.title: Types

parameters.description: Filter by database types (comma-separated). Allowed: any of DbType.

parameters.name: facets

schema.description: Comma-separated facet fields to aggregate. Omitting the parameter returns common facets only (organism, accessibility, and type for cross-type endpoints). An empty string returns no facets. Explicit values fully replace the default selection (no auto-merge with common facets); to keep common facets, list them explicitly (e.g. 'organism,accessibility,objectType'). Allowed: organism, accessibility (default common); type (cross-type only); objectType, relevance, projectType (bioproject only); package, model, host (biosample only); libraryStrategy, librarySource, librarySelection, platform, instrumentModel, libraryLayout (sra-experiment only); analysisType (sra-analysis only); experimentType (gea / metabobank); studyType (jga-study / metabobank); submissionType (metabobank only); datasetType (jga-dataset only); vendor (jga-study only).
schema.title: Facets

parameters.description: Comma-separated facet fields to aggregate. Omitting the parameter returns common facets only (organism, accessibility, and type for cross-type endpoints). An empty string returns no facets. Explicit values fully replace the default selection (no auto-merge with common facets); to keep common facets, list them explicitly (e.g. 'organism,accessibility,objectType'). Allowed: organism, accessibility (default common); type (cross-type only); objectType, relevance, projectType (bioproject only); package, model, host (biosample only); libraryStrategy, librarySource, librarySelection, platform, instrumentModel, libraryLayout (sra-experiment only); analysisType (sra-analysis only); experimentType (gea / metabobank); studyType (jga-study / metabobank); submissionType (metabobank only); datasetType (jga-dataset only); vendor (jga-study only).

parameters.name: facetsSize

schema.description: Maximum number of buckets returned per facet (1-1000, server default 100). Applies uniformly to every facet selected via ``facets`` (per-facet override is not exposed). The ``organism`` label sub-aggregation always uses size 1 and is unaffected. Ignored when ``includeFacets=false`` on ``/entries/*``.
schema.title: Facetssize

parameters.description: Maximum number of buckets returned per facet (1-1000, server default 100). Applies uniformly to every facet selected via ``facets`` (per-facet override is not exposed). The ``organism`` label sub-aggregation always uses size 1 and is unaffected. Ignored when ``includeFacets=false`` on ``/entries/*``.

parameters.name: dbXrefsLimit

schema.description: Maximum number of dbXrefs to return per related type (0-1000). The limit applies per type, not globally; an entry with 200 biosample + 50 sra-study and dbXrefsLimit=100 returns 100 + 50 = 150 dbXrefs total. Use 0 to omit dbXrefs but still get dbXrefsCount (per-type aggregation).
schema.title: Dbxrefslimit

parameters.description: Maximum number of dbXrefs to return per related type (0-1000). The limit applies per type, not globally; an entry with 200 biosample + 50 sra-study and dbXrefsLimit=100 returns 100 + 50 = 150 dbXrefs total. Use 0 to omit dbXrefs but still get dbXrefsCount (per-type aggregation).

parameters.name: includeDbXrefs

schema.description: Include dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount from DuckDB. When false, both are omitted and DuckDB is not queried. When combined with dbXrefsLimit, includeDbXrefs=false takes precedence.
schema.title: Includedbxrefs

parameters.description: Include dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount from DuckDB. When false, both are omitted and DuckDB is not queried. When combined with dbXrefsLimit, includeDbXrefs=false takes precedence.

parameters.name: relevance

schema.description: Term filter on relevance (comma-separated values are OR'd). INSDC 7 controlled values: Agricultural / Medical / Industrial / Environmental / Evolution / ModelOrganism / Other. Re-injectable from the relevance facet bucket value. Values not present in ES yield no hits naturally; no client-side allowlist is enforced.
schema.title: Relevance

parameters.description: Term filter on relevance (comma-separated values are OR'd). INSDC 7 controlled values: Agricultural / Medical / Industrial / Environmental / Evolution / ModelOrganism / Other. parameters.name: facets

parameters.name: facetsSize

schema.description: Maximum number of buckets returned per facet (1-1000, server default 100). Applies uniformly to every facet selected via ``facets`` (per-facet override is not exposed). The ``organism`` label sub-aggregation always uses size 1 and is unaffected. Ignored when ``includeFacets=false`` on ``/entries/*``.
schema.title: Facetssize

parameters.description: Maximum number of buckets returned per facet (1-1000, server default 100). Applies uniformly to every facet selected via ``facets`` (per-facet override is not exposed). The ``organism`` label sub-aggregation always uses size 1 and is unaffected. Ignored when ``includeFacets=false`` on ``/entries/*``.

parameters.name: dbXrefsLimit

schema.description: Maximum number of dbXrefs to return per related type (0-1000). The limit applies per type, not globally; an entry with 200 biosample + 50 sra-study and dbXrefsLimit=100 returns 100 + 50 = 150 dbXrefs total. Use 0 to omit dbXrefs but still get dbXrefsCount (per-type aggregation).
schema.title: Dbxrefslimit

parameters.description: Maximum number of dbXrefs to return per related type (0-1000). The limit applies per type, not globally; an entry with 200 biosample + 50 sra-study and dbXrefsLimit=100 returns 100 + 50 = 150 dbXrefs total. Use 0 to omit dbXrefs but still get dbXrefsCount (per-type aggregation).

parameters.name: includeDbXrefs

schema.description: Include dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount from DuckDB. When false, both are omitted and DuckDB is not queried. When combined with dbXrefsLimit, includeDbXrefs=false takes precedence.
schema.title: Includedbxrefs

parameters.description: Include dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount from DuckDB. When false, both are omitted and DuckDB is not queried. When combined with dbXrefsLimit, includeDbXrefs=false takes precedence.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Cursor token for cursor-based pagination. Opaque HMAC-signed string returned in the previous response's nextCursor. When specified, almost all search/filter parameters and 'page' must use their defaults; exceptions are perPage / dbXrefsLimit / includeDbXrefs which may be combined. PIT lifetime is 5 minutes after first use; expired tokens return 400. Tokens become invalid across server restarts (signing key regenerates).
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Cursor token for cursor-based pagination. Opaque HMAC-signed string returned in the previous response's nextCursor. PIT lifetime is 5 minutes after first use; expired tokens return 400. Tokens become invalid across server restarts (signing key regenerates).

parameters.name: keywords

schema.description: Search keywords. Semantics: (1) comma-separated values are combined with keywordOperator (default OR); (2) spaces inside one value mean AND (all tokens must match in a document); (3) wrap in double quotes for phrase match (e.g. '"whole genome"'); (4) tokens containing - / . + : are auto-phrased (e.g. 'HIF-1', 'COVID-19'); (5) when the value is a single token that matches an INSDC accession ID exactly, 'suppressed' entries are included in the search scope.

Semantics: (1) comma-separated values are combined with keywordOperator (default OR); (2) spaces inside one value mean AND (all tokens must match in a document); (3) wrap in double quotes for phrase match (e.g. '"whole genome"'); (4) tokens containing - / . + : are auto-phrased (e.g. 'HIF-1', 'COVID-19'); (5) when the value is a single token that matches an INSDC accession ID exactly, 'suppressed' entries are included in the search scope.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Cursor token for cursor-based pagination. Opaque HMAC-signed string returned in the previous response's nextCursor. When specified, almost all search/filter parameters and 'page' must use their defaults; exceptions are perPage / dbXrefsLimit / includeDbXrefs which may be combined. PIT lifetime is 5 minutes after first use; expired tokens return 400. Tokens become invalid across server restarts (signing key regenerates).

post.description:
Retrieve multiple entries by their IDs.  Up to 1000 IDs can be specified per request.

**format=json** (default): returns ``{entries: [...], notFound: [...]}``.

**format=ndjson**: returns one entry per line in NDJSON format (Content-Type: application/x-ndjson).  IDs not found are not included in the NDJSON output.

default. Use the ``facets`` parameter to opt in to type-specific
aggregations; the cross-type endpoint accepts any allowlisted facet
name and runs aggregations against the underlying alias, so indices
that lack the field simply produce empty buckets.

parameters.name: keywords

schema.description: Search keywords. Semantics: (1) comma-separated values are combined with keywordOperator (default OR); (2) spaces inside one value mean AND (all tokens must match in a document); (3) wrap in double quotes for phrase match (e.g. '"whole genome"'); (4) tokens containing - / . + : are auto-phrased (e.g. 'HIF-1', 'COVID-19'); (5) when the value is a single token that matches an INSDC accession ID exactly, 'suppressed' entries are included in the search scope.

parameters.name: keywords

schema.description: Search keywords. Semantics: (1) comma-separated values are combined with keywordOperator (default OR); (2) spaces inside one value mean AND (all tokens must match in a document); (3) wrap in double quotes for phrase match (e.g. '"whole genome"'); (4) tokens containing - / . + : are auto-phrased (e.g. 'HIF-1', 'COVID-19'); (5) when the value is a single token that matches an INSDC accession ID exactly, 'suppressed' entries are included in the search scope.

parameters.name: facets

schema.description: Comma-separated facet fields to aggregate. Omitting the parameter returns common facets only (organism, accessibility, and type for cross-type endpoints). An empty string returns no facets. Explicit values fully replace the default selection (no auto-merge with common facets); to keep common facets, list them explicitly (e.g. 'organism,accessibility,objectType'). Allowed: organism, accessibility (default common); type (cross-type only); objectType, relevance, projectType (bioproject only); package, model, host (biosample only); libraryStrategy, librarySource, librarySelection, platform, instrumentModel, libraryLayout (sra-experiment only); analysisType (sra-analysis only); experimentType (gea / metabobank); studyType (jga-study / metabobank); submissionType (metabobank only); datasetType (jga-dataset only); vendor (jga-study only).
schema.title: Facets

parameters.description: Comma-separated facet fields to aggregate. Omitting the parameter returns common facets only (organism, accessibility, and type for cross-type endpoints). An empty string returns no facets. Explicit values fully replace the default selection (no auto-merge with common facets); to keep common facets, list them explicitly (e.g. 'organism,accessibility,objectType'). Allowed: organism, accessibility (default common); type (cross-type only); objectType, relevance, projectType (bioproject only); package, model, host (biosample only); libraryStrategy, librarySource, librarySelection, platform, instrumentModel, libraryLayout (sra-experiment only); analysisType (sra-analysis only); experimentType (gea / metabobank); studyType (jga-study / metabobank); submissionType (metabobank only); datasetType (jga-dataset only); vendor (jga-study only).

parameters.name: facetsSize

schema.description: Maximum number of buckets returned per facet (1-1000, server default 100). Applies uniformly to every facet selected via ``facets`` (per-facet override is not exposed). The ``organism`` label sub-aggregation always uses size 1 and is unaffected. Ignored when ``includeFacets=false`` on ``/entries/*``.
schema.title: Facetssize

parameters.description: Maximum number of buckets returned per facet (1-1000, server default 100). Applies uniformly to every facet selected via ``facets`` (per-facet override is not exposed). The ``organism`` label sub-aggregation always uses size 1 and is unaffected. Ignored when ``includeFacets=false`` on ``/entries/*``.

400.description: Bad Request (facet selected but not applicable to the endpoint, e.g. ``facets=libraryStrategy`` on ``/facets/bioproject``).

get.description: Get facet counts for sra-sample entries. Type-specific filters (shared across sra-*): libraryStrategy/librarySource/librarySelection/platform/instrumentModel/libraryLayout/analysisType (term); derivedFromId (nested); libraryName/libraryConstructionProtocol/geoLocName/collectionDate (text).

parameters.name: keywords

schema.description: Search keywords. Semantics: (1) comma-separated values are combined with keywordOperator (default OR); (2) spaces inside one value mean AND (all tokens must match in a document); (3) wrap in double quotes for phrase match (e.g. '"whole genome"'); (4) tokens containing - / . + : are auto-phrased (e.g. 'HIF-1', 'COVID-19'); (5) when the value is a single token that matches an INSDC accession ID exactly, 'suppressed' entries are included in the search scope.
schema.title: Keywords

parameters.description: Search keywords. Semantics: (1) comma-separated values are combined with keywordOperator (default OR); (2) spaces inside one value mean AND (all tokens must match in a document); (3) wrap in double quotes for phrase match (e.g. '"whole genome"'); (4) tokens containing - / . + : are auto-phrased (e.g. 'HIF-1', 'COVID-19'); (5) when the value is a single token that matches an INSDC accession ID exactly, 'suppressed' entries are included in the search scope.

get.summary: DB Portal cross-database fan-out (count + top hits)
get.description: Fan-out search across 8 databases (6 Elasticsearch + 2 Solr). Per-backend timeouts and a global timeout enforce partial-failure tolerance: individual DB errors surface in `databases[i].error` while the response stays 200. All-DB failure returns 502. Pagination concepts (db / cursor / page / perPage / sort) are rejected with 400 `unexpected-parameter`; use /db-portal/search for paginated single-DB queries.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Search query.  Bare word / quoted phrase / ``field:value`` / ``AND``/``OR``/``NOT`` (uppercase) / parenthesized groups in a single expression.  Bare words and phrases are matched as free text against indexed fields; ``field:value`` constrains to a specific field.  Tier 1 (cross): ``identifier``, ``title``, ``name``, ``description``, ``organism_id``, ``organism_name``, ``date_published``, ``date_modified``, ``date_created``, ``date``.  Tier 2 (cross): ``submitter``, ``publication``.  Tier 3 (single-DB only): BioProject ``object_type`` / ``project_type`` / ``grant_title`` / ``grant_agency`` / SRA ``library_strategy`` etc. / JGA ``study_type`` / GEA+MetaboBank ``experiment_type`` / MetaboBank ``submission_type`` / Ddbj ``division`` etc. / Taxonomy ``rank`` etc.  Free text may only appear as the sole top-level term or directly under a top-level AND (max one); placing it under OR / NOT or nested AND yields 400 ``invalid-freetext-position``.  Errors surface as RFC 7807 problem details with a dedicated ``type`` URI (``unexpected-token`` / ``unknown-field`` / ``field-not-available-in-cross-db`` / ``invalid-freetext-position`` / ``duplicate-freetext`` etc.).
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Search query.  Bare word / quoted phrase / ``field:value`` / ``AND``/``OR``/``NOT`` (uppercase) / parenthesized groups in a single expression.  Bare words and phrases are matched as free text against indexed fields; ``field:value`` constrains to a specific field.  Tier 1 (cross): ``identifier``, ``title``, ``name``, ``description``, ``organism_id``, ``organism_name``, ``date_published``, ``date_modified``, ``date_created``, ``date``.  Tier 2 (cross): ``submitter``, ``publication``.  Tier 3 (single-DB only): BioProject ``object_type`` / ``project_type`` / ``grant_title`` / ``grant_agency`` / SRA ``library_strategy`` etc. / JGA ``study_type`` / GEA+MetaboBank ``experiment_type`` / MetaboBank ``submission_type`` / Ddbj ``division`` etc. / Taxonomy ``rank`` etc.  Free text may only appear as the sole top-level term or directly under a top-level AND (max one); placing it under OR / NOT or nested AND yields 400 ``invalid-freetext-position``.  Errors surface as RFC 7807 problem details with a dedicated ``type`` URI (``unexpected-token`` / ``unknown-field`` / ``field-not-available-in-cross-db`` / ``invalid-freetext-position`` / ``duplicate-freetext`` etc.).

parameters.name: topHits

schema.description: Per-DB top hits count.  ``0`` returns count-only (``databases[i].hits`` is ``null``); ``1``-``50`` returns up to N hits per DB.  Hits are ordered by relevance (``_score`` desc) with ``identifier`` ascending as the tiebreaker; when ``q`` is omitted (``match_all``) all scores tie, so ``identifier`` ascending becomes the effective order.  Out of range (>50 or negative) returns 422.
schema.title: Tophits

parameters.description: Per-DB top hits count.  ``0`` returns count-only (``databases[i].hits`` is ``null``); ``1``-``50`` returns up to N hits per DB.  Hits are ordered by relevance (``_score`` desc) with ``identifier`` ascending as the tiebreaker; when ``q`` is omitted (``match_all``) all scores tie, so ``identifier`` ascending becomes the effective order.  Out of range (>50 or negative) returns 422.

parameters.name: keywordOperator

schema.description: Default boolean operator for connecting comma-separated FreeText tokens (e.g. ``q=cancer,tumor``).  Default **OR** (matches Google-like behaviour and the same parameter on ``/entries/*``).  ``AND`` requires every token to match; ``OR`` requires at least one. Tokens inside a single FreeText value (e.g. ``q=cancer tumor``) are always AND-combined regardless of this setting (use double quotes for phrase match).  The explicit ``AND`` / ``OR`` / ``NOT`` operators inside the DSL are unaffected.  ``/db-portal/parse`` does not accept this parameter (the parsed AST does not carry operator state).

parameters.description: Default boolean operator for connecting comma-separated FreeText tokens (e.g. ``q=cancer,tumor``).  Default **OR** (matches Google-like behaviour and the same parameter on ``/entries/*``).  ``AND`` requires every token to match; ``OR`` requires at least one. Tokens inside a single FreeText value (e.g. ``q=cancer tumor``) are always AND-combined regardless of this setting (use double quotes for phrase match).  The explicit ``AND`` / ``OR`` / ``NOT`` operators inside the DSL are unaffected.  ``/db-portal/parse`` does not accept this parameter (the parsed AST does not carry operator state).

parameters.name: facets

schema.description: Comma-separated facet names to aggregate, scoped to the current ``q`` (optional; omitting it returns no facets).  Cross-search accepts ``organism`` / ``accessibility`` / ``type`` only (ES entries-alias aggregation); any other name returns 400 ``facet-not-applicable``.  Allowlist typos return 422.  See ``docs/db-portal-api-spec.md`` § facet 集計.
schema.title: Facets

parameters.description: Comma-separated facet names to aggregate, scoped to the current ``q`` (optional; omitting it returns no facets).  Cross-search accepts ``organism`` / ``accessibility`` / ``type`` only (ES entries-alias aggregation); any other name returns 400 ``facet-not-applicable``.  Allowlist typos return 422.  See ``docs/db-portal-api-spec.md`` § facet 集計.

parameters.name: facetsSize

schema.description: Maximum number of buckets returned per facet (1-1000, server default 100).  Applies uniformly to every facet selected via ``facets``.  The ``organism`` label sub-aggregation always uses size 1 and is unaffected.  Compatible with ``cursor``.
schema.title: Facetssize

parameters.description: Maximum number of buckets returned per facet (1-1000, server default 100).  Applies uniformly to every facet selected via ``facets``.  The ``organism`` label sub-aggregation always uses size 1 and is unaffected.  Compatible with ``cursor``.

parameters.name: facetSelfExclude

schema.description: When ``true``, drop each facet's own ``q`` filter from that facet's aggregation population (self-exclusion for multi-select sidebars); other conditions (other facets, free text, ``status``) still apply, and the hits themselves stay filtered by the full ``q``.  Default ``false`` keeps the population identical to the hits.  Compatible with ``cursor`` but not applied on the cursor path (the cursor token carries no AST).  See ``docs/db-portal-api-spec.md`` § 集計母集団と self-exclusion.
schema.title: Facetselfexclude

parameters.description: When ``true``, drop each facet's own ``q`` filter from that facet's aggregation population (self-exclusion for multi-select sidebars); other conditions (other facets, free text, ``status``) still apply, and the hits themselves stay filtered by the full ``q``.  Default ``false`` keeps the population identical to the hits.  Compatible with ``cursor`` but not applied on the cursor path (the cursor token carries no AST).  See ``docs/db-portal-api-spec.md`` § 集計母集団と self-exclusion.

400.description: Bad Request (unexpected parameter, query parse/validate error).

post.summary: DB Portal cross-database fan-out by AST (count + top hits + dsl echo)
post.description: Same fan-out as GET /db-portal/cross-search but the query AST is sent in the request body ({ast}) instead of as ?q=, and the normalized dsl is echoed for shared-URL sync. Lets db-portal collapse the interactive serialize->navigate->parse round-trips into one request. Tier 3 fields return 400 field-not-available-in-cross-db; ast omitted/null searches all records and echoes dsl=''.

parameters.name: topHits

schema.description: Per-DB top hits count.  ``0`` returns count-only (``databases[i].hits`` is ``null``); ``1``-``50`` returns up to N hits per DB.  Hits are ordered by relevance (``_score`` desc) with ``identifier`` ascending as the tiebreaker; when ``ast`` is omitted (``match_all``) all scores tie, so ``identifier`` ascending becomes the effective order.  Out of range (>50 or negative) returns 422.
schema.title: Tophits

parameters.description: Per-DB top hits count.  ``0`` returns count-only (``databases[i].hits`` is ``null``); ``1``-``50`` returns up to N hits per DB.  Hits are ordered by relevance (``_score`` desc) with ``identifier`` ascending as the tiebreaker; when ``ast`` is omitted (``match_all``) all scores tie, so ``identifier`` ascending becomes the effective order.  Out of range (>50 or negative) returns 422.

parameters.name: keywordOperator

schema.description: Default boolean operator for connecting comma-separated FreeText tokens. Default **OR**.  ``AND`` requires every token to match; ``OR`` requires at least one.  Tokens inside a single FreeText value are always AND-combined (use double quotes for phrase match).  The explicit ``AND`` / ``OR`` / ``NOT`` operators inside the AST are unaffected.

parameters.description: Default boolean operator for connecting comma-separated FreeText tokens. Default **OR**.  ``AND`` requires every token to match; ``OR`` requires at least one.  Tokens inside a single FreeText value are always AND-combined (use double quotes for phrase match).  The explicit ``AND`` / ``OR`` / ``NOT`` operators inside the AST are unaffected.

parameters.name: facets

schema.description: Comma-separated facet names to aggregate, scoped to the current ``q`` (optional; omitting it returns no facets).  Cross-search accepts ``organism`` / ``accessibility`` / ``type`` only (ES entries-alias aggregation); any other name returns 400 ``facet-not-applicable``.  Allowlist typos return 422.  See ``docs/db-portal-api-spec.md`` § facet 集計.
schema.title: Facets

parameters.description: Comma-separated facet names to aggregate, scoped to the current ``q`` (optional; omitting it returns no facets).  Cross-search accepts ``organism`` / ``accessibility`` / ``type`` only (ES entries-alias aggregation); any other name returns 400 ``facet-not-applicable``.  Allowlist typos return 422.  See ``docs/db-portal-api-spec.md`` § facet 集計.

parameters.name: facetsSize

schema.description: Maximum number of buckets returned per facet (1-1000, server default 100).  Applies uniformly to every facet selected via ``facets``.  The ``organism`` label sub-aggregation always uses size 1 and is unaffected.  Compatible with ``cursor``.
schema.title: Facetssize

parameters.description: Maximum number of buckets returned per facet (1-1000, server default 100).  Applies uniformly to every facet selected via ``facets``.  The ``organism`` label sub-aggregation always uses size 1 and is unaffected.  Compatible with ``cursor``.

parameters.name: facetSelfExclude

schema.description: When ``true``, drop each facet's own ``q`` filter from that facet's aggregation population (self-exclusion for multi-select sidebars); other conditions (other facets, free text, ``status``) still apply, and the hits themselves stay filtered by the full ``q``.  Default ``false`` keeps the population identical to the hits.  Compatible with ``cursor`` but not applied on the cursor path (the cursor token carries no AST).  See ``docs/db-portal-api-spec.md`` § 集計母集団と self-exclusion.
schema.title: Facetselfexclude

parameters.description: When ``true``, drop each facet's own ``q`` filter from that facet's aggregation population (self-exclusion for multi-select sidebars); other conditions (other facets, free text, ``status``) still apply, and the hits themselves stay filtered by the full ``q``.  Default ``false`` keeps the population identical to the hits.  Compatible with ``cursor`` but not applied on the cursor path (the cursor token carries no AST).  See ``docs/db-portal-api-spec.md`` § 集計母集団と self-exclusion.

400.description: Bad Request (invalid-ast body schema violation, unexpected-parameter, query validate/scope error such as field-not-available-in-cross-db).

get.description: Single-database hits search with pagination. `db` is required (400 `missing-db` if omitted). Elasticsearch-backed DBs support cursor-based pagination; Solr-backed DBs (db=ddbj / db=taxonomy) are offset-only (400 `cursor-not-supported` if cursor is supplied). On ES DBs, `cursor` cannot be combined with `q` / `sort` / `page>1` (400 `about:blank`, cursor exclusivity). Cross-database counts go through /db-portal/cross-search instead.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Search query.  Bare word / quoted phrase / ``field:value`` / ``AND``/``OR``/``NOT`` (uppercase) / parenthesized groups in a single expression.  Bare words and phrases are matched as free text against indexed fields; ``field:value`` constrains to a specific field.  Tier 1 (cross): ``identifier``, ``title``, ``name``, ``description``, ``organism_id``, ``organism_name``, ``date_published``, ``date_modified``, ``date_created``, ``date``.  Tier 2 (cross): ``submitter``, ``publication``.  Tier 3 (single-DB only): BioProject ``object_type`` / ``project_type`` / ``grant_title`` / ``grant_agency`` / SRA ``library_strategy`` etc. / JGA ``study_type`` / GEA+MetaboBank ``experiment_type`` / MetaboBank ``submission_type`` / Ddbj ``division`` etc. / Taxonomy ``rank`` etc.  Free text may only appear as the sole top-level term or directly under a top-level AND (max one); placing it under OR / NOT or nested AND yields 400 ``invalid-freetext-position``.  Errors surface as RFC 7807 problem details with a dedicated ``type`` URI (``unexpected-token`` / ``unknown-field`` / ``field-not-available-in-cross-db`` / ``invalid-freetext-position`` / ``duplicate-freetext`` etc.).
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Search query.  Bare word / quoted phrase / ``field:value`` / ``AND``/``OR``/``NOT`` (uppercase) / parenthesized groups in a single expression.  Bare words and phrases are matched as free text against indexed fields; ``field:value`` constrains to a specific field.  Tier 1 (cross): ``identifier``, ``title``, ``name``, ``description``, ``organism_id``, ``organism_name``, ``date_published``, ``date_modified``, ``date_created``, ``date``.  Tier 2 (cross): ``submitter``, ``publication``.  Tier 3 (single-DB only): BioProject ``object_type`` / ``project_type`` / ``grant_title`` / ``grant_agency`` / SRA ``library_strategy`` etc. / JGA ``study_type`` / GEA+MetaboBank ``experiment_type`` / MetaboBank ``submission_type`` / Ddbj ``division`` etc. / Taxonomy ``rank`` etc.  Free text may only appear as the sole top-level term or directly under a top-level AND (max one); placing it under OR / NOT or nested AND yields 400 ``invalid-freetext-position``.  Errors surface as RFC 7807 problem details with a dedicated ``type`` URI (``unexpected-token`` / ``unknown-field`` / ``field-not-available-in-cross-db`` / ``invalid-freetext-position`` / ``duplicate-freetext`` etc.).

parameters.name: db

schema.description: Target database (required).  Allowed: ``ddbj``, ``sra``, ``bioproject``, ``biosample``, ``jga``, ``gea``, ``metabobank``, ``taxonomy``.  ``ddbj`` routes to ARSA (Solr) and ``taxonomy`` to TXSearch (Solr); the other six DBs use Elasticsearch.  Omitting returns 400 ``missing-db``; for cross-database count, use ``/db-portal/cross-search``.

parameters.name: page

schema.description: Page number (1-based).  Combined with perPage, page * perPage must be <= 10000 (deep paging limit; exceeding returns 400).
schema.title: Page

parameters.description: Page number (1-based).  Combined with perPage, page * perPage must be <= 10000 (deep paging limit; exceeding returns 400).

parameters.name: perPage

schema.description: Items per page.  Allowed: 20, 50, 100.
schema.title: Perpage

parameters.description: Items per page.  Allowed: 20, 50, 100.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Cursor token for cursor-based pagination (HMAC-signed, PIT 5 min). When specified, q / sort / page must use their defaults (db and perPage may be combined). Combining cursor with q / sort / page>1 on ES DBs returns 400 'about:blank' (cursor exclusivity). Solr-backed DBs (db=ddbj / db=taxonomy) are cursor-incompatible and return 400 'cursor-not-supported' if cursor is supplied.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Cursor token for cursor-based pagination (HMAC-signed, PIT 5 min). When specified, q / sort / page must use their defaults (db and perPage may be combined). parameters.name: sort

schema.title: Sort

parameters.description: Sort order.  Allowed: null (relevance, default), ``datePublished:desc``, ``datePublished:asc``.

parameters.name: keywordOperator

schema.description: Default boolean operator for connecting comma-separated FreeText tokens (e.g. ``q=cancer,tumor``).  Default **OR**.  ``AND`` requires every token to match; ``OR`` requires at least one.  Tokens inside a single FreeText value (e.g. ``q=cancer tumor``) are always AND-combined regardless of this setting (use double quotes for phrase match).  The explicit ``AND`` / ``OR`` / ``NOT`` operators inside the DSL are unaffected.  Exclusive with cursor when not at default (OR).

parameters.description: Default boolean operator for connecting comma-separated FreeText tokens (e.g. ``q=cancer,tumor``). The explicit ``AND`` / ``OR`` / ``NOT`` operators inside the DSL are unaffected.  Exclusive with cursor when not at default (OR).

parameters.name: facets

schema.description: Comma-separated facet names to aggregate, scoped to the current ``q`` (optional; omitting it returns no facets).  Accepted names depend on ``db``: ES DBs allow the common facets (``organism`` / ``accessibility``) plus that DB's type-specific facets (e.g. ``db=sra`` → ``libraryStrategy`` etc.); ``db=ddbj`` allows ``division`` / ``molecularType``; ``db=taxonomy`` allows ``rank`` / ``kingdom``.  An out-of-scope name returns 400 ``facet-not-applicable``; an allowlist typo returns 422.  Compatible with ``cursor``.  See ``docs/db-portal-api-spec.md`` § facet 集計.

Accessibility.title: Accessibility
Accessibility.description: INSDC accessibility levels carried by every entry.

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: Primary accession used as the ES `_id` (e.g. "PRJDB1234", "PRJNA12345").

properties.title: Properties
properties.description: Raw element tree carried over from the source XML (converted via xmltodict). Schema-free nested structure; prefer the typed sibling fields for structured access. This field exists to round-trip the source representation.

distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.description: Distributions (Schema.org DataDownload). Key is always emitted, even when empty.

isPartOf.title: Ispartof
isPartOf.description: Coarse-grained index category (used by the front-end DB facet). Always "bioproject" for BioProject entries.

type.title: Type
type.description: Fine-grained entry type. Always "bioproject" for this index (use `objectType` to distinguish umbrella entries).

objectType.title: Objecttype
objectType.description: BioProject object kind. "UmbrellaBioProject" = upper-level entry that has child BioProjects; "BioProject" = regular leaf entry.

name.title: Name
name.description: Short name (sourced from the `Name` element of the source XML).

title.title: Title
title.description: Long human-readable title (sourced from the `Title` element of the source XML).

relevance.title: Relevance
relevance.description: Names of relevance tags whose value was "yes" in the source XML. Possible names: Agricultural / Medical / Industrial / Environmental / Evolution / ModelOrganism / Other.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Participating organizations. Key is always emitted, even when empty.

publication.title: Publication
publication.description: Associated publications. Key is always emitted, even when empty.

grant.title: Grant
grant.description: Associated grants. Key is always emitted, even when empty.

externalLink.title: Externallink
externalLink.description: External UI links. Key is always emitted, even when empty.

dbXrefs.title: Dbxrefs
dbXrefs.description: Edges in the dblink graph. Key is always emitted, even when empty. Populated only when the JSONL was generated with `--include-dbxrefs`.

parentBioProjects.title: Parentbioprojects
parentBioProjects.description: Parent BioProjects in the umbrella DAG. Key is always emitted, even when empty.

childBioProjects.title: Childbioprojects
childBioProjects.description: Child BioProjects in the umbrella DAG. Key is always emitted, even when empty.

sameAs.title: Sameas
sameAs.description: Alias accessions of this entry (e.g. GEO cross-references). Key is always emitted, even when empty.

status.title: Status
status.description: Public release state of the INSDC record. "public" = released; "private" = not released (hidden by the API as 404); "suppressed" = retrievable only via exact ID match; "withdrawn" = retracted (hidden by the API as 404).

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Access-control category in DDBJ Search. "public-access" entries are freely retrievable; "controlled-access" entries (e.g. JGA) require explicit authorization.

dateCreated.title: Datecreated
dateCreated.description: ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD) creation date. None if absent in the source.

dateModified.title: Datemodified
dateModified.description: ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD) last-modified date. None if absent in the source.

datePublished.title: Datepublished
datePublished.description: ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD) publication date. None if absent in the source.

BioProject.description: A BioProject entry — one document of the Elasticsearch `bioproject` index.

BulkFormat.description: Output format for the Bulk API.

ids.title: Ids
ids.description: List of entry identifiers to retrieve (1-1000). Duplicates are deduplicated server-side; each id is returned at most once either in 'entries' or 'notFound'.

entries.title: Entries
entries.description: Found entries (raw ES documents). 'public' and 'suppressed' entries are returned here; 'withdrawn', 'private', and missing ids are listed under notFound.

notFound.title: Notfound
notFound.description: IDs that were not found (missing or hidden by visibility filter: 'withdrawn' / 'private'). Always satisfies len(entries) + len(notFound) == len(set(ids)).

BulkResponse.title: BulkResponse
BulkResponse.description:
Response for POST /entries/{type}/bulk (format=json).

``entries`` contains the found entries as raw ES documents.
``notFound`` lists IDs that could not be found.

items.title: Items
items.description: Accessions to count linked entries for.

type.description: Accession type.

DbLinksCountsRequestItem.title: DbLinksCountsRequestItem
DbLinksCountsRequestItem.description: A single item in the bulk counts request.

type.description: Accession type.

counts.title: Counts
counts.description: Per-type linked accession counts. Keys are AccessionType values; absent type means zero links. Returns empty dict for accessions with no links (not 404).

DbLinksCountsResponseItem.title: DbLinksCountsResponseItem
DbLinksCountsResponseItem.description: A single item in the bulk counts response.

type.description: Source accession type.

dbXrefs.title: Dbxrefs
dbXrefs.description: Related entries (sorted deterministically by type ascending, then identifier ascending). Empty list when no related entries exist (still returns 200).

count.title: Count
count.description: Hit count (null when error is set).

unavailableFields.title: Unavailablefields
unavailableFields.description: DSL field names that made this arm field_not_applicable (count=null). Non-null only when error='field_not_applicable'; null otherwise.

hits.title: Hits
hits.description: Lightweight top hits for this DB (up to topHits items, relevance order).  ``null`` when ``topHits=0``; ``[]`` when ``error`` is set; otherwise 0..topHits items.

DbPortalCount.title: DbPortalCount
DbPortalCount.description:
A single DB entry in the cross-search response.

Carries the per-DB count and, when ``topHits>=1``, up to ``topHits``
lightweight hits.  ``hits`` is ``null`` when ``topHits=0`` and an
empty list when the per-DB call failed (``error`` set).

DbPortalCountError.title: DbPortalCountError
DbPortalCountError.description: Error reason for a DB entry in the cross-search count response.

databases.title: Databases
databases.description: Per-database count and (when topHits>=1) lightweight hits.  Fixed length 8, fixed order.

facets.description: Facet aggregation over the ES entries alias (organism / accessibility / type only) when the ``facets`` parameter is supplied; ``null`` otherwise.  Solr-backed DBs (ddbj / taxonomy) are not included.  ``null`` if the aggregation request failed or timed out (the count fan-out still returns 200).  See db-portal-api-spec.md § facet 集計.

dsl.title: Dsl
dsl.description: Normalized DSL serialized from the request AST (same output as ``POST /db-portal/serialize``).  Reusable as ``GET ?q=<dsl>`` for shared-URL background sync; empty string when ``ast`` is omitted.

databases.title: Databases
databases.description: Per-database count and (when topHits>=1) lightweight hits.  Fixed length 8, fixed order.

facets.description: Facet aggregation over the ES entries alias (organism / accessibility / type only) when the ``facets`` parameter is supplied; ``null`` otherwise.  Solr-backed DBs (ddbj / taxonomy) are not included.  ``null`` if the aggregation request failed or timed out (the count fan-out still returns 200).  See db-portal-api-spec.md § facet 集計.

DbPortalCrossSearchResponse.title: DbPortalCrossSearchResponse
DbPortalCrossSearchResponse.description:
Cross-database response (8 entries, fixed order, count + top hits).

Order: ddbj, sra, bioproject, biosample, jga, gea, metabobank, taxonomy.
Each entry carries count and (when ``topHits>=1``) up to ``topHits``
lightweight hits per DB.

DbPortalDb.title: DbPortalDb
DbPortalDb.description: Database identifier for db-portal search (8 values).

type.title: Type
type.description: Entry count per database type / subtype. Aggregated on cross-type search (database-type buckets) and on the db-portal db=sra / db=jga scopes (subtype buckets, e.g. sra-experiment / jga-dataset). Null when not aggregated.

organism.title: Organism
organism.description: Entry count per organism. ``value`` is the NCBI Taxonomy ID (string), ``label`` is the scientific name; ``value`` can be re-injected into ``?organism=`` directly. Null when not aggregated (e.g. excluded from an explicit ``facets`` selection).

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Entry count per accessibility level. Null when not aggregated.

relevance.title: Relevance
relevance.description: BioProject relevance count (bioproject only, opt-in). INSDC controlled values: Agricultural / Medical / Industrial / Environmental / Evolution / ModelOrganism / Other.

package.title: Package
package.description: BioSample package count (biosample only, opt-in). bucket value is the package name (``package.name`` keyword).

libraryLayout.title: Librarylayout
libraryLayout.description: Library layout count (sra-experiment only, opt-in). Cardinality 2.

datasetType.title: Datasettype
datasetType.description: JGA dataset type count (jga-dataset only, opt-in).

projectType.title: Projecttype
projectType.description: BioProject projectType count (bioproject only, opt-in). bucket value is the ``projectType.keyword`` exact value; the paired search parameter ``projectType`` performs analyzed text match, so re-injecting a bucket value may return a superset of the bucket (use ``?projectType="<value>"`` to force phrase match).

host.title: Host
host.description: BioSample host count (biosample only, opt-in). bucket value is the ``host.keyword`` exact value (cardinality ~134K); the paired search parameter ``host`` performs analyzed text match, so re-injecting a bucket value may return a superset of the bucket (use ``?host="<value>"`` to force phrase match). Due to the high cardinality, large ``facetsSize`` values (e.g. 1000) trigger expensive shard-level aggregation; prefer the default ``facetsSize=100`` and narrow the query (keywords / organism / etc.) before requesting this facet.

vendor.title: Vendor
vendor.description: JGA vendor count (jga-study only, opt-in). bucket value is the ``vendor.keyword`` exact value; the paired search parameter ``vendor`` performs analyzed text match.

division.title: Division
division.description: Ddbj division count (db=ddbj only). INSDC division code (ARSA ``Division`` field).

molecularType.title: Moleculartype
molecularType.description: Ddbj molecular type count (db=ddbj only, ARSA ``MolecularType`` field). Re-inject a bucket value as ``molecular_type:<value>`` in the DSL ``q``.

rank.title: Rank
rank.description: Taxonomy rank count (db=taxonomy only, TXSearch ``rank`` field).

kingdom.title: Kingdom
kingdom.description: Taxonomy kingdom count (db=taxonomy only, TXSearch ``kingdom`` field).

DbPortalFacets.title: DbPortalFacets
DbPortalFacets.description:
Facet aggregation results for db-portal endpoints.

Extends the shared :class:`~ddbj_search_api.schemas.common.Facets`
(ES-backed facets) with the four Solr-backed facets that only
db-portal exposes: ``division`` / ``molecularType`` (ddbj / ARSA) and
``rank`` / ``kingdom`` (taxonomy / TXSearch).  The same convention
applies to every field: ``null`` = not aggregated, ``[]`` = aggregated
with zero buckets.  See docs/db-portal-api-spec.md § facet 集計.

DbPortalHitSra.title: DbPortalHitSra
DbPortalHitSra.description:
SRA hit (6 subtypes share one variant; subtype-specific fields are optional).

``type`` values: ``sra-submission`` / ``sra-study`` / ``sra-experiment`` /
``sra-run`` / ``sra-sample`` / ``sra-analysis``.

Subtype-specific populate rules:
- ``library_strategy`` / ``library_source`` / ``library_layout`` / ``platform`` /
  ``instrument_model`` / ``library_name`` / ``library_construction_protocol`` are
  populated only on ``sra-experiment`` hits.
- ``analysis_type`` is populated only on ``sra-analysis`` hits.
- ``geo_loc_name`` / ``collection_date`` are populated only on ``sra-sample`` hits
  (shared schema with BioSample).

Remaining subtypes leave the unrelated fields as ``null``.

DbPortalLightweightHit.title: DbPortalLightweightHit
DbPortalLightweightHit.description:
12-field hit envelope returned by ``/db-portal/cross-search``.

Carries only the common fields shared across all 8 db-portal DBs.
DB-specific extras present in ``DbPortalHit`` (used by
``/db-portal/search``) — ``projectType``, ``libraryStrategy``,
``division``, ``rank``, ``commonName`` etc. — are not part of this
envelope.

``type`` covers all 16 possible hit values: the 8 db-portal DBs with
sub-types where applicable (``sra-*``, ``jga-*``) plus the
Solr-backed fixed literals ``ddbj`` and ``taxonomy``.

DbPortalParseBoolOp-Output.title: DbPortalParseBoolOp
DbPortalParseBoolOp-Output.description: Boolean node combining child clauses with AND / OR / NOT.

value.title: Value
value.description: Free-text value (the bare word or unquoted phrase).

is_phrase.title: Is Phrase
is_phrase.description: True when the value was originally quoted (``"..."`` / ``'...'``) in the DSL. Backend compiles such FreeText to ``multi_match.type=phrase`` (ES) / quoted edismax token (Solr) for order-preserving phrase match. False for bare words. Always present in the response.

DbPortalParseFreeText.title: DbPortalParseFreeText
DbPortalParseFreeText.description: Free-text leaf produced from bare word / quoted phrase in the query.

field.title: Field
field.description: Date field (date_published, date_modified, date_created, or alias 'date').

DbPortalParseLeafRange.title: DbPortalParseLeafRange
DbPortalParseLeafRange.description: Leaf clause for a date range (op='between').

DbPortalParseLeafValue.title: DbPortalParseLeafValue
DbPortalParseLeafValue.description: Leaf clause with scalar value (eq / contains / wildcard).

ast.title: Ast
ast.description: Parsed AST as SSOT query-tree JSON.

ast.title: Ast
ast.description: AST JSON tree (same shape as GET /db-portal/parse response).  Optional: null / omitted searches all records (match_all) and the response echoes ``dsl=""``.

DbPortalSearchByAstRequest.title: DbPortalSearchByAstRequest
DbPortalSearchByAstRequest.description:
Request body for ``POST /db-portal/cross-search`` and ``/db-portal/search``.

``ast`` reuses ``DbPortalParseNode`` so a parse response / serialize input
can be sent back verbatim.  Schema violations surface as 400 ``invalid-ast``
(see ``ddbj_search_api.main`` request-validation handler).  ``ast`` is
optional: ``null`` / omitted means the ``q``-less GET behaviour (match_all /
``*:*`` full fan-out) and the handler echoes ``dsl=""``.

ast.title: Ast
ast.description: AST JSON tree (same shape as GET /db-portal/parse response).

DbPortalSerializeRequest.title: DbPortalSerializeRequest

``ast`` reuses ``DbPortalParseNode`` so the parse response can be sent
back verbatim.  Schema violations are surfaced as 400 ``invalid-ast``
(see ``ddbj_search_api.main`` request-validation handler).

dsl.title: Dsl
dsl.description: Normalized DSL string.  Reusable as ``q`` for ``GET /db-portal/parse`` / ``GET /db-portal/cross-search`` / ``GET /db-portal/search``.

DbType.title: DbType
DbType.description: Database types supported by the API.

dbXrefs.title: Dbxrefs
dbXrefs.description: All cross-references for the entry (no truncation). Returned via streaming from DuckDB; may contain references to non-public entries (withdrawn / private accessions) since the underlying edge table is not status-filtered.

type.title: Type
type.description: Schema.org "@type" value (effectively the constant "DataDownload").

encodingFormat.title: Encodingformat
encodingFormat.description: Representation format of a Schema.org Distribution. "JSON" / "JSON-LD" / "XML" describe textual metadata payloads; "FASTQ" / "SRA" describe binary sequencing data downloads.

contentUrl.title: Contenturl
contentUrl.description: Download URL where the distribution can be retrieved.

Distribution.description: Schema.org-compatible DataDownload entry describing a single distribution of a record.

type.title: Type
type.description: Database type (e.g. 'bioproject').

dbXrefs.description: Cross-references (truncated by dbXrefsLimit).

EntryListItem.title: EntryListItem
EntryListItem.description:
Summary representation of an entry in search result lists.

The actual fields vary by database type.  Common fields shared by all
types are declared here; type-specific fields are captured by
``extra="allow"``.

EntryListResponse.title: EntryListResponse
EntryListResponse.description: Search result list with pagination and optional facets.

ExternalLink.title: ExternalLink
ExternalLink.description: External link attached to a BioProject or JGA entry for UI display.

value.title: Value
value.description: Facet value (re-injectable into the matching search filter).

count.title: Count
count.description: Number of entries matching this value.

FacetBucket.title: FacetBucket
FacetBucket.description: A single bucket in a facet aggregation.

type.title: Type
type.description: Entry count per database type / subtype. Aggregated on cross-type search (database-type buckets) and on the db-portal db=sra / db=jga scopes (subtype buckets, e.g. sra-experiment / jga-dataset). Null when not aggregated.

organism.title: Organism
organism.description: Entry count per organism. ``value`` is the NCBI Taxonomy ID (string), ``label`` is the scientific name; ``value`` can be re-injected into ``?organism=`` directly. Null when not aggregated (e.g. excluded from an explicit ``facets`` selection).

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Entry count per accessibility level. Null when not aggregated.

relevance.title: Relevance
relevance.description: BioProject relevance count (bioproject only, opt-in). INSDC controlled values: Agricultural / Medical / Industrial / Environmental / Evolution / ModelOrganism / Other.

package.title: Package
package.description: BioSample package count (biosample only, opt-in). bucket value is the package name (``package.name`` keyword).

libraryLayout.title: Librarylayout
libraryLayout.description: Library layout count (sra-experiment only, opt-in). Cardinality 2.

datasetType.title: Datasettype
datasetType.description: JGA dataset type count (jga-dataset only, opt-in).

projectType.title: Projecttype
projectType.description: BioProject projectType count (bioproject only, opt-in). bucket value is the ``projectType.keyword`` exact value; the paired search parameter ``projectType`` performs analyzed text match, so re-injecting a bucket value may return a superset of the bucket (use ``?projectType="<value>"`` to force phrase match).

host.title: Host
host.description: BioSample host count (biosample only, opt-in). bucket value is the ``host.keyword`` exact value (cardinality ~134K); the paired search parameter ``host`` performs analyzed text match, so re-injecting a bucket value may return a superset of the bucket (use ``?host="<value>"`` to force phrase match). Due to the high cardinality, large ``facetsSize`` values (e.g. 1000) trigger expensive shard-level aggregation; prefer the default ``facetsSize=100`` and narrow the query (keywords / organism / etc.) before requesting this facet.

vendor.title: Vendor
vendor.description: JGA vendor count (jga-study only, opt-in). bucket value is the ``vendor.keyword`` exact value; the paired search parameter ``vendor`` performs analyzed text match.

Facets.title: Facets
Facets.description:
Facet aggregation results.

Every field is optional (nullable). The ``facets`` query parameter
on the request side selects which aggregations to compute, and only
selected fields are returned as a list; the rest are ``null``.
This means callers can distinguish "aggregated but no buckets"
(empty list ``[]``) from "not aggregated" (``null``).

Default behaviour (no ``facets`` parameter): ``organism`` and
``accessibility`` are populated; ``type`` is also populated on
cross-type endpoints. All other fields default to ``null``.

Explicit ``facets=...`` selection fully replaces the default
(no auto-merge), so passing ``facets=objectType`` returns
``organism`` / ``accessibility`` as ``null``.

The ``status`` facet is intentionally omitted: aggregations are
always constrained to ``status:public`` upstream, so the bucket
would be degenerate.  See ``docs/api-spec.md`` for the data
visibility policy.

OrganismFacetBucket.title: OrganismFacetBucket
OrganismFacetBucket.description:
A facet bucket for the ``organism`` aggregation.

``organism`` is the only facet that exposes a separate display
label.  ``value`` carries the NCBI Taxonomy ID (string, matches the
``^\d+$`` pattern enforced by the ``organism`` search filter), and
``label`` carries the scientific name (e.g. ``"Homo sapiens"``)
chosen as the doc_count-most-frequent ``organism.name.keyword`` value
inside the bucket.  Callers can re-inject ``value`` into
``?organism=`` directly; ``label`` is for human display.

anyOf.description: Role an organization plays in a project. "owner" = primary owner; "participant" = participating organization; "submitter" = direct submitter; "broker" = submission broker on behalf of others.
Category describing the scale or nature of an organization (INSDC vocabulary).

Organization.title: Organization
Organization.description: Organization linked to an entry (e.g. submitter, participating institution).

page.title: Page
page.description: Current page number (1-based). Null in cursor mode.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of matching items (exact count via track_total_hits=true on Elasticsearch).

nextCursor.title: Nextcursor
nextCursor.description: Cursor token for the next page. Null on the last page.

Pagination.title: Pagination
Pagination.description:
Pagination metadata (supports both offset and cursor modes).

Two schema-level examples are attached: the first represents offset
mode (``page=1``, ``nextCursor`` populated, ``hasNext=true``), the
second represents cursor mode on the last page (``page=null``,
``nextCursor=null``, ``hasNext=false``). OpenAPI 3.1 schema-level
examples cannot carry labels, so the order is the contract.

type.title: Type
type.description: Problem type URI (RFC 7807). Generic errors use 'about:blank'; endpoint-specific failures use 'https://ddbj.nig.ac.jp/problems/<slug>' (e.g. 'cursor-not-supported', 'unknown-field'). URI need not be dereferenceable; it functions as an identifier.

examples: The requested bioproject entry was not found.

instance.title: Instance
instance.description: Request path where the error occurred.

requestId.title: Requestid
requestId.description: Request tracking ID (same as X-Request-ID header).

examples.detail: The requested bioproject entry was not found.

date.title: Date

url.title: Url
url.description: URL of the publication. Generated from `id` according to `dbType` (PubMed / DOI / PMC templates) when possible.

anyOf.description: Identifier type of `Publication.id`. "pubmed" = PubMed ID; "doi" = DOI string; "pmc" = PMC ID; "other" = identifier kept verbatim because it does not match any of the above.

dbType.title: Dbtype
dbType.description: Kind of `id`. None when the source value cannot be classified.

analysisType.title: Analysistype

status.title: Status

elasticsearch.title: Elasticsearch

UmbrellaTreeEdge.title: UmbrellaTreeEdge
UmbrellaTreeEdge.description: Directed edge in the umbrella tree (BioProject accessions).

query.title: Query
query.description: Resolved primary identifier of the requested BioProject. Always the primary accession even if the request used a sameAs secondary id.

roots.title: Roots
roots.description: Root BioProject accessions (entries whose parentBioProjects list is empty). Deterministically sorted. Orphan input returns a single-element list containing the query itself.

edges.title: Edges
edges.description: Unique (parent, child) pairs covering the reachable subgraph. Deterministically sorted (parent ascending, then child ascending). Duplicates from DAG multi-path traversals are deduplicated. Dangling edges (parent or child missing from the bioproject index) are dropped.

UmbrellaTreeResponse.title: UmbrellaTreeResponse
UmbrellaTreeResponse.description:
Flat graph representation of a BioProject umbrella tree.

Orphan entries return ``roots == [query]`` and ``edges == []``.

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: Accession ID of the referenced peer record.

type.title: Type
type.description: Accession type of an entry in the dblink graph (21 values). The DB family of the referenced peer record.

url.title: Url
url.description: Canonical URL of the referenced peer record.

Xref.title: Xref
Xref.description: A single reference edge in the dblink graph (pointer to a peer accession).

tags.name: Entry Detail
tags.description: Single-entry retrieval (frontend-oriented detail, raw ES document, JSON-LD, and the umbrella tree for BioProject).

tags.name: Bulk
tags.description: Multi-entry retrieval (JSON array or NDJSON streaming).

tags.name: dblink
tags.description: DBLinks API: cross-reference lookup via DuckDB.

tags.name: db-portal
tags.description: DB Portal frontend API: unified search across ES (6 DBs) and Solr (ARSA / TXSearch), with a query parser for field-prefixed clauses and free text.
